title: promotion-event.v1
description: An audit-trail event recorded when a memory changes promotion tier (Phase 12). mqobsidian is the sole producer; all repos may consume the trail. `from`/`to` use the memory-score.v1 promotion axis. Every promotion is explainable (reason) and reversible (a downgrade is just a promotion-event in the other direction) — see ADR-008.

source_evidence_refs.description: Refs resolved from memory-evidence-manifest.v1 that justified this transition. Copied verbatim from the manifest; an opaque or unresolvable ref blocks the transition instead of appearing here.

journal_id.description: Transition journal that produced this event. Its presence in the log is the commit marker: recovery finishes forward when the event exists, and restores prior snapshots when it does not.

verb.description: The requested transition. from/to remain authoritative; verb records which operator action produced them.

compensates.description: Event id this event reverses. Set only on compensation events appended when forward recovery cannot complete; the log is append-only and never truncated.
